	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy

	- ABIEncoderV2PackedStorage_0.4.x
	- ExpExponentCleanup
	- EventStructWrongData
	- OneOfTwoConstructorsSkipped.
It is used by:
	- >=0.4.22<0.6.0 (ICBB.sol#9)
